name: Webhook Relay
description: Forward CLIaaS events to any external URL via webhook. Supports HMAC-SHA256 payload signing and per-event filtering for secure, flexible integrations.
author: CLIaaS

actions.name: Send Test Payload
actions.description: Send a test payload to the configured webhook URL

url.description: The external URL to forward events to

secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 payload signing

events.description: Optional list of events to relay (empty = all events)
